entry.title: How to clear summarised ledger Accounting Document lines individually (BSEG/ACDOCA)
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are running S/4 HANA and have recently hit the issue of needing to create an Invoice with over 999 lines. At this point I have now realised that we should be concentrating on the new Accounting Document tables that replace the likes of BSEG, by using summarising BaDIs etc to create an Accounting Document.

In a working example, I have created an Accounting Document with 3 entry lines (In BSEG) and 8 G/L posting lines (In ACDOCA). The 2nd BSEG line is actually 6 summarised G/L posting lines that appear correctly in ACDOCA and each of these lines have unique data on them that should be considered when clearing.

So much like BSEG-ZUONR (Assignment) is usually considered in automatic (Or manual) clearing, I now wish to use a Z field from ACDOCA to be considered in clearing. I can select this field in OB74 but it doesn't seem to work.

I get the feeling that I can only clear summarised BSEG lines individually and I cannot clear individual G/L lines from ACDOCA. 

Is this the case? I feel like I should be able to clear individual ACDOCA lines even though they have been summarised in BSEG, but I'm not sure how.

[Example Scenario]

  • BSEG Document 1000000001
    • Line 1: Customer Account for -£10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for £8 with Assignment '123'
    • Line 3: Tax line for £2

  • BSEG Document 1000000002
    • Line 1: Customer Account for £10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for -£8 with Assignment '456'
    • Line 3: Tax line for -£2

  • ACDOCA Postings for 1000000001
    • Line 1: Customer Account for -£10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'ABC'
    • Line 3: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'DEF'
    • Line 4: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'GHI'
    • Line 5: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'JKL'
    • Line 6: Tax line for £2

  • ACDOCA Postings for 1000000002
    • Line 1: Customer Account for £10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'ABC'
    • Line 3: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'MNO'
    • Line 4: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'PQR'
    • Line 5: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'STU'
    • Line 6: Tax line for -£2

In the above example, I would like the ACDOCA lines with Assignment 'ABC' for £2 to clear as this ledger line has been completed and now balance. These do not get picked up by F.13 or other clearing transactions however because they look at the BSEG version of the Z-Assignment field value rather than the ACDOCA Z-Assignment field value.

Is this possible to do? And if so, how?!

Any thoughts or experience on this would be greatly appreciated. Many thanks.

entry.title: SD
entry.content: Resolvido

entry.title: T-codes used for clearing GL accounts.
entry.content: I want to know all the T-codes used for clearing GL accounts. I have encountered an issue where some GL accounts have no open items, but I still want to clear them. What can I do?

entry.title: Pre-edited approval table.
entry.content: Would you like to know if there is a table that stores the documents with record of release and approval of pre-edited documents (FBV0)?

entry.title: Payment Terms with PROX + Days
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I need your help to configure the payment terms:

1% 3rd PROX + 30 Net EOM
3rd Prox = 10/3
+30 = 11/3 (discount date)
EOM = 11/30 (net date)

entry.title: Auto posting against Project/WBS SAP
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have requirement to post fixed amount document against Project in PS every month before running RA. Based on the status of the job. Is it possible to achievable. Please guide me I am new to PS module.

Regards

entry.content: Please explain the accounting entries for subcontracting process in details.....for FI entry Inventory

entry.title: getting diff for the below Fixed Asset Register vs GL accountas
entry.content:
I am getting diff for the below Fixed Asset Register vs GL accounts

AS per far 2,216,940

AS Per GL 2,221,624

Variance   4,683

NEED HELP REGARDING THIS ISSUE AND HOW TO FIX IT 

THANKS IN ADVANCE

entry.title: Boleto de Concessionárias CNAB 240 - Segmento O
entry.content:
Olá experts

Estou configurando o segmento O no DMEE utilizando o layout BR_FEBRABAN_A, porém estou com dúvida a respeito do código de barras.

Pagamentos a concessionárias possuem código de barras de 48 posições, porém no SAP ECC temos o campo com somente 47 posições.

Existe alguma forma de converter as 47 posições em 48 através do cálculo dos dígitos? Ou seria possível criar uma tabela Z para alimentar os dados e parametrizar o atributo na DMEE para buscar dessa tabela. Vi também que existe a sugestão da SAP do uso do campo BSEG-SGTXT, mas não sei como codificar ou especificar para que tal campo seja lido.

Agradeço desde já pelas sugestões e ajuda.

#FEBRABAN

entry.title: I need to compare two balance sheet structures (transaction OB58).
entry.content:
I need to compare two balance sheet structures (transaction OB58).

Does anyone have any tips?

I see tables FAGL_011QT, FAGL_011ZC AND FAGL_011PC...but don't understand.

New GL

Tks.

entry.title: Activate change pointer for alternative CCH
entry.content:
Hi Guru, 

I hope you are are all doing well. 

may i request for your expertise and help on this topic : 

I would like to activate change pointer for alternative cost center hierarchy.

now we are able to fill BDCP2 with idoc COGRP1 but only when we update the standard hierarchy. not nothing happened when we update the alternative hierarchy. 

The point is that we would like to have automatic transport of the Alt CCH each time it is updated.  

All custo has been done as we can manage standard hierarchy. 

Please note that your help would be very well appreciate. 

Thank you in advance.  

Regardes 

Lelo.

entry.title: No dunning date set for direct debit customer
entry.content:
Hi,

I implemented BTE 00001060 using note 3182278 to include customers with direct debit in the dunning run.
But after reviewing the dunned document the dunning date and dunning level are missing:

This is how I implemented the function module:

 

FUNCTION z_fi_fm_bte_interface_00001060.
  c_xzalb = space.
ENDFUNCTION.

 

After a dunning run with transaction F150 the document 10019053/2024 is correctly listed in the log:

> Account D 0014000315 has a payment method for incoming payments                      FM 805 S
> Account D 0014000315 read items: 1                                                   FM 803 S
>     Processing and completing dunning lines ------- Phase I ---                      FM 818 S
> Document 0010019053/2024/001 has new dunning level 1.                                FM 831 S
>     Check legal dunning procedure and credit memos --- Phase II -                    FM 822 S
>     Minimum charges and dunning interest ----------- Phase III --                    FM 817 S
>     Generate dunning data ------------------------- Phase IV --                      FM 816 S
...
> Dunning level 1 is used for account D 0014000315                                     FM 811 S
>     Document 0010019053/2024/001: Dunning level 1, days in arrears 60, status <.Dpi> FM 834 S
> Account D 0014000315 dunning data has been generated.                                FM 806 S

Message FM834 states that the document has now dunning level 1. The dunning notice is printed correctly.

What am I missing? What is necessary to set the dunning date and level for the document?

entry.title: Specific description of CoA:YCOA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Regarding to CoA:YCOA, I have to share specific descliption of all Account codes.
Because my customer can not understand YCOA's Account without description every account codes.
If there is document or site that specific description of every accounts of CoA:YCOA, let me know.
※ I have already seen BP_CLD_ENTPR_2408_Account_Master_Data_for_YCOA.xlsx of Process navigator.

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Handling reverse charge mechanism for SST
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am seeking clarification on the handling of the reverse charge mechanism within SAP, specifically in the context of the Sales and Services Tax (SST) applicable in Malaysia.

The users have already made postings using the input tax account, and thus we need to transfer the taxes to the expenses account as a corrective measure. It has come to our attention that this can be achieved using the "Post Tax Payables" application. However, it's noted that this application currently only facilitates transfers between two tax accounts or between a tax account and a tax payable account, which may not be tax-relevant. 

Could someone please provide insights on how to effectively manage the reverse charge mechanism in SAP under these circumstances as the manual transfer doesn't looks like a standard approach? Additionally, I am open to making any necessary taxation configurations based on SST compliance. Are there any specific solutions or best practices tailored for SST that we should consider?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,
Rishav.

entry.title: Issue in Display of Cost in S_ALR_8103558 report against Statistical WBS.
entry.content:
Issue in Display of Actual Cost in SAP Standard S_ALR_8103558 reports against Statistical WBS elements.

Please refer the following scenarios:

Project Structure in CJ20N:

Project is Statistical Nature:

 

All WBSEs checked with Statistical-

 

 

Actual Cost showing in CN41N report:

 

Actual cost showing against the Project / WBS is INR 100,000.00

Hence the Assigned Value will be 100,000.00 + 280,000.00 = 380,000.00

 

Assigned Value in CJ33 Screen:

 

Assigned value showing correct with reference to earlier calculation and screenshot.

Analysis of Active Availability Control 1:

 

Only one cost element has been shown as “exempted” which is not being used in present scenario.

 

Actual Cost of INR 100,000.00 booked in Value Type 11

Assigned values are also 200,000.00 + 180,000.00 = 380,000.00 (Actual Cost included here)

 

Actual Cost Line Items CJI3 Report:

 

Actual Cost showing 100,000.00 INR.

But when we view the S_ALR_87013558 and similar reports:

Here Actual Cost columns showing Zero value which is not correct.

 

Please note that this issue is coming only for Statistical WBSe only.

When we posted the actual cost using the similar G/L accounts against regular Project WBS which are not statistical, actual values are showing properly in ALR reports.

These reports are very important to identify the available amount for further planning activity in projects but wrong figures often misleading the Project planners.

I have referred multiple Notes from SAP and our all settings looks OK.

Please let me know if anything has been missed here or any note needs to be implemented.

Please help on this matter.

entry.title: Trading partner validation request for intercompany GL accounts document posting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently when we trying to post the FB01 for AB document type with GL from set. We getting the validation error but field is not available for update (manual entry). As per request they want to update the trading partner at time of simulation of general ledger before posting the posting document. Below is the Validation we created.

Validation

  • If a GL is in a set (you define the set name, GL attached), the company code is XXXX and document type is not in a set ( the document type set should at least include CS billing) then check whether the trading partner field is populated.
  • If trading partner is not populated, then trigger an error message “ Trading partner value is mandatory for GL xxxxxxx”

entry.title: Change description for COPA/Margin Analisys characteristic linked to data element
entry.content:
FIN Controlling FIN Cost Object Controlling

Dear all,

We have a self-created characteristic in CO-PA/Margin Analysis which is linked to data element. We create these characteristics by the append with the component Type KNNR – Customer.

Here we can see the description of data element.

As the data element in the original table is named "Customer", we now have several characteristics with the same description "Customer" in our CO-PA/Margin Analysis.

Is there any way to change the text of this own-created characteristic ZZWW* in CO-PA/Margin Analysis?

We want to give the characteristics a name other than "Customer".

Thanks

Kind regards

entry.title: Bank determination configuration for Virtual Card payment method
entry.content:
Our client is using supplier financing with Virtual card as one of the payment method for vendor payments

In FBZP under payment method at country. i selected Supplier financing under payment method classification

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/b2d44c1091094b5a810c2a879ee95522/456ad556235247d0bcefe88572406429.html?version=2023.001

Issue with bank determination

  1. when generating the payment proposal for all company codes it is looking for bank determination configuration (error)
  2. At the  time of payment run money doesn't go out of clients bank account but the bank finances to the vendor from its own funds and issue Virtual cards to the vendors.
  3. At the end of the month bank will issue a invoice to clients only for the used virtual cards.
  4. Monthly payment will go out of only clients bank account.

As there is no link with the bank account, Can you advice how this can be managed in FBZP as there is no House bank and Account ID for Virtual card payment method.

entry.title: PSM Funds Management Closing Operations
entry.content:
Hi All

I am working on Budgeting in Funds Management. In the closing operations we have FMDM -Closing Operations Monitor. Here Carry fwd budget for commitments is disallowed                     ( Screenshot). My project requires to carry forward of budget for commitments to next year. How I can make it allowed. 

Please let me know

entry.title: Carry forward of Residual Budget to next year
entry.content:
Hi 

I want to carryover residual budget to next year. I execute Tcode FMMPCOVRN for this. Every time I run this it shows error like -Release and Budget amounts are inconsistent or the Budget amount is not sufficient for the release. I also tried with Budget with automatic release.  Please let me know how to resolve the issue
